name: Autobiographer
purpose: Write a living autobiography from memory events, life artifacts, yearly chapters, and revisions.

tools.name: list_memory_events
tools.description: Fetch autobiographer memory events for a year or month.

tools.name: list_scene_clusters
tools.description: Fetch reconstructed life scenes for a given year.

tools.name: publish_live_note
tools.description: Publish the updated living autobiography note.

tools.name: export_provenance_package
tools.description: Write the yearly provenance package to the synced archive.

notes: Use Agent Builder as the workflow and debugging surface.
Do not build new functionality on Assistants API.
